description: GPU compute price indices over MCP; every value carries a verify URL. Five key-free tools.
name: io.github.zeroatflops/flopsindex-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional API key that upgrades the five public tools (list_indices, search_indices, get_price, get_index, verify) to full-precision values. Without it the tools work key-free and return the delayed public price. Forwarded as the X-FLOPS-Api-Key header. A partner tier with higher fidelity and expanded coverage is available — contact team@flopsindex.com.
environmentVariables.name: FLOPS_API_KEY

title: FLOPS Compute Intelligence
